description_long: This is a large, ornate plant pot with a deep, circular basin and a wide rim, finished in a rich green stone-like material. The pot is supported by four elegant, curved bronze legs, each ending in a decorative flourish. Around the exterior, there are four prominent bronze panels, each bordered by vertical supports, and two of the panels are flanked by sculpted animal head handles. The interior is spacious and appears to be lined with the same green material as the exterior. The bronze elements, including the handles and rim, have a polished, reflective quality, adding a sense of luxury. The overall design suggests a classical or antique style, suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A large, ornate green and bronze plant pot with sculpted animal head handles, decorative panels, and elegant curved legs, exuding a classical, luxurious style.
description_view_0: Front view showing a prominent bronze panel and both sculpted animal head handles on either side.
description_view_1: Side view with a bronze panel and a single animal head handle visible, highlighting the curved legs and rim.
description_view_2: Rear view with a bronze panel and both animal head handles visible, similar to the front but with subtle differences in panel detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a bronze panel and a single animal head handle, mirroring view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_location: urban park or upscale outdoor plaza
attribute_placement_context: commonly used as a decorative planter in public squares or luxury garden entrances
attribute_decorative_pattern: bronze animal head handles and embossed panels
